listeners.purpose: Finalization chain step 1 (runs first). Uses transaction::TransactionRecorder::recordChargebackLoss($event->chargeback_id) to record the double-entry ledger movement for the disputed amount: debit chargebacks_expense, credit cash. Persists transaction_id back onto the chargeback row.

Finalization chain step 2. Uses NetworkFeeCalculator::compute + transaction::TransactionRecorder::recordChargebackFee to record the SECONDARY offsetting Transaction for the network fee: debit chargeback_fees, credit cash. Persists fee_transaction_id back onto the chargeback row. Fires ChargebackNetworkFeeRecorded.

Finalization chain step 3. Uses invoice::InvoiceStateUpdater::markDisputed to update parent invoice.status='disputed' + persist amount_disputed_cents. Also invokes invoice::CreditNoteIssuer::createFromChargeback for tax-reversal credit note (except reason_category='card_recovery').

Finalization chain step 4. Uses ClawbackCoordinator::fanOut to dispatch ChargebackClawbackReferral (when materialized referral reward exists) + ChargebackClawbackCoupon (when redeemed coupon exists) events downstream.

Finalization chain step 5. Dispatches marketing::ChargebackFiled negative-value conversion + fraud signal event (Wave 5 bridge). Ad networks subtract from ROAS + retrain fraud models. Consent-gate: advertising tier.

Dispatches ChargebackLostNotification to admin (P1). Includes decision_reason + amount + fee_cents + total_cost + link to the chargeback detail. NOT sent to customers (some card networks explicitly prohibit surfacing chargeback outcomes to the customer). Runs AFTER the finalization chain — admin sees the notification only when the chargeback is fully processed downstream.

Expired chargebacks trigger the same finalization chain as lost — auto-loss. Dispatches FinalizeChargebackJob which invokes the ChargebackLost finalization chain (this listener's peers under the ChargebackLost event). Notification distinguishes 'auto-lost due to missed evidence deadline'.

Reduces parent payment.amount_disputed_cents back to reflect the win. NOTE: won chargebacks still incur the initial network fee — banks don't refund the fee they collected. This listener reduces only the disputed_cents tracking, not the fee tracking.
Dispatches ChargebackWonNotification to admin only. NOT sent to customers (card network rules).

RDR path — dispatches ChargebackAcceptedRefundNotification to customer + admin. Customer sees a refund confirmation framed as 'your dispute has been resolved — a refund has been issued'. Admin sees the RDR outcome (no fee, no rate impact).
Dispatches ChargebackFiledNotification (P0 — immediate SMS + push + email). Money has been forcibly reversed — admin must act to defend within the evidence deadline.
Dispatches CollectChargebackEvidenceJob to auto-collect evidence from invoice + membership + notifications + support modules. Pre-populates the evidence bundle for admin review.
Escalating cadence notifications. Sent at 7d before deadline (P2), 3d before (P1), 1d before (P0). Includes days_remaining + current_evidence_completeness_percent + link to submit-evidence UI.

P1. Dispatches ChargebackRateThresholdExceededNotification to admin (tenant-facing) + Academorix platform ops (cross-tenant). Merchant-account termination risk if sustained. Includes prevention recommendations.

Wave 4 bridge. When a PaymentDispute is lost (customer's bank filed a full chargeback after pre-chargeback resolution): dispatches CreateChargebackFromDisputeJob to create a Chargeback row from the lost dispute — snapshots reason_code + reason_category + amount + currency + provider + provider_reference_id from the parent PaymentDispute.

Wave 4 bridge. Payment module's webhook handler dispatches this event on chargeback-typed webhooks (e.g. Stripe 'charge.dispute.created', Paddle 'transaction.chargeback', Adyen 'NOTIFICATION_OF_CHARGEBACK'). This listener parses the provider event + calls ChargebackOrchestrator::createFromWebhook (for new chargebacks) OR ChargebackReconciler::reconcileFromWebhook (for status updates on existing chargebacks — the provider communicates 'evidence received', 'under review', 'won', 'lost' via webhook).

RDR path bridge. When a Refund with metadata.originating_chargeback_id succeeds: transition the linked chargeback to accepted_refund (terminal) + fire ChargebackAcceptedRefund. Only fires when the refund's metadata.originating_chargeback_id is set (populated by RdrHandler when creating the refund).
GDPR minimisation. When a user is erased as submitted_by_user_id on any ChargebackEvidence: schedule 90-day-post-erasure redaction of user_id references. Retention window unchanged.
Migrates invoice-linked chargebacks to compliance_archive.chargebacks + compliance_archive.chargeback_evidence BEFORE the TenantErased cascade. Financial-obligation retention override.
Cascade delete via FK for non-archived chargebacks; writes compliance audit trail entry + emits count metrics.
